title: Manifest Approved Bypass Registry
description: Hand-curated registry of direct mutations that are explicitly exempt from the canonical write path. Validated by `manifest audit-bypasses`. Each entry documents the entity, path, reason, why-runtime-not-required, tenant boundary, owner, and approval/review dates so governance reviews have full provenance.

entity.description: Name of the entity being bypassed. MUST match an entry in the governed-entity registry.

path.description: Repo-root-relative path to the file containing the bypass. Forward-slashed even on Windows.

methods.description: Optional HTTP methods scope. Omit to apply to all methods.

reason.description: Human-readable description of WHAT the bypass does.

whyRuntimeNotRequired.description: Why this mutation legitimately does not need runtime governance. NOT 'we will migrate later'.

tenantBoundary.description: What tenant/security boundary still applies to the bypass. E.g. 'enforced by RLS', 'admin-only via Clerk middleware', 'no tenant data'.

owner.description: Human or team responsible for the bypass. Email, Slack handle, or GH username.

reviewBy.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) by which the bypass MUST be re-reviewed. Past dates are reported as warnings (default) or errors (--strict-expiry).

note.description: Optional free-form note (linked ticket, migration plan, etc.).
